/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_ascendc_cust_optiling.so -o libcustom_ascendc_cust_optiling.so CMakeFiles/cust_optiling.dir/qmm_custom.cpp.o   -L/home/developer/Ascend/cann-9.0.0/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/developer/Ascend/cann-9.0.0/lib64 -lnnopbase -lexe_graph -lregister -ltiling_api -Wl,--whole-archive -lrt2_registry -Wl,--no-whole-archive
